# FINMENTOR

FINMENTOR is an external CFO and financial control methodology website for business owners. The site is in Russian and focuses on management reporting, Cash Flow, P&L, treasury, working capital, KPI, risk control, dashboards, and business-model-specific CFO systems.

Primary URL: https://www.finmentor.md/
Primary language: ru
Contact: cfo@finmentor.md
Telegram Bot: https://t.me/finmentor_md_bot

## Key Pages

- https://www.finmentor.md/ — FINMENTOR overview, business models, methodologies, expert modules, founder, contact form.
- https://www.finmentor.md/questionnaire.html — Финансовый рентген бизнеса, quick diagnostic and gated extended intake before Discovery Call.
- https://www.finmentor.md/retail-margin-engine.html — FINMENTOR Retail Margin Engine, CFO model for shelf, category, SKU, supplier credit, promo, retrobonus, dashboard and QA logic.
- https://www.finmentor.md/business-control-system.html — Business Control System for owner-level financial management.
- https://www.finmentor.md/monthly-cfo-support.html — Regular external CFO support.
- https://www.finmentor.md/working-capital-scan.html — Contextual mini-scan for working capital risks.
- https://www.finmentor.md/materials.html — Knowledge hub and articles.
- https://www.finmentor.md/privacy.html — Privacy policy.
- https://www.finmentor.md/terms.html — Terms of materials use.

## Positioning

FINMENTOR is not positioned as an automatic diagnosis tool. Digital tools and automation help speed and quality, while final conclusions and recommendations pass expert review.

## Data And Privacy

The website must not send personal data to GA4. Lead forms send data only to the configured Make/n8n webhook after user consent. If the webhook is not configured, users are offered fallback options: copy result, Telegram Bot, or email.
